source.title: Patria Investments Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
source.notes: Record organic fundraising of $7.7B for FY2025 (exceeding revised $6B target by $1.7B). Total AUM grew 26% to $52.6B. FEAUM up 24% to $40.8B. FRE of $202.5M (+19% YoY). 2026 guidance: $7B fundraising, $225-245M FRE. Three acquisitions announced (Solis, RBR, WP Global Partners).
